name: Nguyen Van Hiep
bio: Hiep is a co-founder of LoSec and a 0-day researcher with a focus on discovering and exploiting vulnerabilities. He has extensive experience in reverse engineering, vulnerability research, and exploit development. Hiep's work involves identifying security flaws in software and developing proof-of-concept exploits to demonstrate their impact.

name: Le The Thang
bio: Thang is a co-founder of LoSec and a 0-day researcher with a focus on LLM-assisted vulnerability discovery. He has a deep understanding of software internals and uses AI tools to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of vulnerability research. Thang's work bridges the gap between traditional security research and cutting-edge AI techniques.

name: Dang Le Quoc Khanh
bio: Khanh is a skilled security researcher with expertise in bug bounty hunting and red teaming. He has a strong background in identifying vulnerabilities in web applications, networks, and systems. Khanh's work involves simulating real-world attacks to assess the security posture of organizations and provide actionable recommendations for improvement.

name: Nguyen Quang Ba
bio: Ba specializes in offensive mobile research, focusing on discovering and exploiting vulnerabilities in iOS and Android applications. He combines deep knowledge of mobile platforms with hands-on exploitation skills to uncover critical security issues.
